name: Glorious Grape Gelatin
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl sprinkle the gelatin over cold water. Set aside for 5 minutes to soften.
2. Bring the grape juice to a boil and stir in the softened gelatin.
3. Allow the mixture to cool to room temperature.
4. Refrigerate the mixture, stirring occasionally until it reaches a consistency slightly thicker than unbeaten egg whites.
5. Stir in the sliced banana.
6. Spoon the mixture into a 6-cup mold and chill until firm.
OR
Pour a little gelatin mixture into each serving dish. Slice about half a banana per dish. Top with remaining gelatin and stir gently.
